# Look A Like Solutions

> Look A Like Solutions is a premium digital marketing agency headquartered in Bengaluru, India, delivering SEO, performance marketing, social media marketing, branding, web design & development, content marketing, online reputation management, lead generation, and AI SEO / Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) services.

## Key Facts
- Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- Phone: +91-9731588244
- Email: info@lookalikesolutions.com
- Trusted by 500+ businesses across Bengaluru and India
- Full-service digital marketing agency with specialists in SEO, paid media, social, creative, and development
